_comment_delay: minDelayMinutes / maxDelayMinutes: random interval between two master events (in real-time minutes).
_comment_migration: biomeMigrationChance: probability (0.0-1.0) that when a timed event ends, it migrates to another biome instead of stopping. 0.0 = disabled.
_comment_ai05weights: ai05BossTierWeights: relative spawn weights per boss tier for the AI05 boss incursion event. Higher = more likely to be chosen.

events._comment: Boss invasion: Doomlord + minions pour the wilderness. windowMinutes = duration of the event.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAIDoomlord.DoomlordWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Boss invasion: Singerie + minions rampage the wilderness.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAISingerie.SingerieWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Boss invasion: Druid + animal minions overrun the wilderness.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAIDruid.DruidWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Boss invasion: Ghost + minions haunt the wilderness. Spawns only 22:00-04:00.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAIGhost.GhostWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Boss invasion: Mushroom + minions infest the wilderness.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAIMushroom.MushroomWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Boss invasion: Headless + minions patrol the wilderness.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAIHeadless.HeadlessWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Boss invasion: Archer + minions hunt in the wilderness.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAIArcher.ArcherWildernessRuntime

events._comment: Mega horde: massive zombie wave across the map.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI01.MegaHordeRuntime

events._comment: Heatmap: raises the hazard level, increasing zombie spawn tiers.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI02.HeatmapHazardIncreaseEvent

events._comment: Heatmap: lowers the hazard level, decreasing zombie spawn tiers.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI02.HeatmapHazardDecreaseEvent

events._comment: Kill replacement: every zombie killed spawns more. windowMinutes = duration.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI03.SpawnReplaceOnKillEvent

events._comment: Ghost on-kill: each kill spawns a ghost minion nearby. windowMinutes = duration.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI06.GhostMinionOnKillEvent

events._comment: Airdrop x2: doubles the number of airdrops.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI04.AirdropEventX2

events._comment: Airdrop x4: quadruples the number of airdrops.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI04.AirdropEventX4

events._comment: Airdrop x6: sextuples the number of airdrops.
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI04.AirdropEventX6

events._comment: Boss incursion: arms a boss spawn at fixed coordinates in the target biome. The boss spawns once the chunk is loaded (up to 30 min timeout).
events.name: AeclipseCustomZombieAI05.BossTierDropRuntime
